summary: Completed comprehensive frontend testing of the Portfolio Slideshow feature. All 7 requested features tested and PASSED - auto-play (4 seconds), WAbilvård as first slide, hover overlay with project info, navigation dots, prev/next arrows, pause on hover, and smooth transitions.
passed_tests: Portfolio slideshow auto-plays every 4 seconds - slides change automatically as expected
WAbilvård is correctly the first slide (index 0) in the portfolio slideshow with proper image from emergentagent.com
Hover overlay displays project name and category - shows 'WAbilvård' title and 'Automotive' category on hover
Navigation dots (4) at bottom allow switching between slides - clicking dots navigates to correct slides
Previous/Next arrow buttons exist and work correctly - navigation arrows visible on hover
Slideshow pauses auto-play on hover - tested by hovering for 5 seconds, slide remained unchanged
Slideshow resumes auto-play on mouse leave - slide advances after mouse moves away
Smooth fade transitions between slides using framer-motion AnimatePresence
All 4 portfolio images load successfully: WAbilvård, Nexus Finance, Vertex Studio, Pulse Health
Correct data-testid attributes present: portfolio-slideshow, portfolio-slide-{n}, portfolio-dot-{n}, portfolio-prev-btn, portfolio-next-btn, portfolio-slide-title
context_for_next_testing_agent: Portfolio slideshow feature fully implemented and working. WAbilvård uses custom image from emergentagent.com, other 3 portfolio items use Unsplash images. All navigation controls (dots, arrows) and hover effects working as expected. Auto-play interval is 4000ms with pause on hover functionality.
